title: Config 8: adamw width=320 depth=2 batch=128 aug=none
methodology: Generated a 2-hidden-layer MLP with width 320, batch size 128, adamw at lr=0.0008, dropout=0.3, weight_decay=0.0005, augmentation=none, and label_smoothing=0.0.
